title: Water Resource Availability and Quality Assessment Framework
description: A flowchart illustrating the interconnected factors affecting water availability and quality, from natural sources to human consumption and potential contamination pathways.
relationships: Precipitation feeds into Surface Water and Groundwater
Surface Water and Groundwater are sources for Water Treatment
Water Treatment provides water for Human Consumption and Agricultural/Industrial Use
Wastewater can be treated or become a Pollution Source
Pollution Sources can contaminate Surface Water and Groundwater
